## Summary

Describe the change and the workflow it affects.

## Checks

- [ ] I did not add large datasets, checkpoints, trajectories, or VASP outputs.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, private machine paths, or cluster-specific secrets.
- [ ] I updated documentation for any user-facing behavior or command changes.
- [ ] I ran relevant tests, lint checks, or smoke checks.

## Notes

Mention any dataset, checkpoint, or hardware assumptions needed to reproduce
the change.
